title: C Values, Integer Conversions, and Size Arithmetic · Memory Repair Bay
summary: An incident responder inherits a corrupted checked size and conversion policy, the earliest failing input, and two plausible hypotheses; they must preserve first-failure evidence, repair the cause, and add a regression. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in checked size and conversion policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select integer types from range, signedness, rank, width, and representation requirements rather than familiar spelling.
Trace integer promotions and usual arithmetic conversions before comparing, shifting, indexing, or sizing.
Use size_t for object sizes, ptrdiff_t for valid pointer differences, and guarded conversions at API boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Integer Ranges Ranks
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug native-systems team handles memory case 9931. Produce bounded C evidence to reject a size calculation that exceeds its bound; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Produce bounded C evidence to reject a size calculation that exceeds its bound; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Evaluate C23 _BitInt and implementation limits without assuming a novel width improves ABI portability.

For Publish the incident record · Debug Bitint C23 Boundary, challenge the documented misconception with changed-size, failure-injection, printed invariant, compiler, sanitizer, analyzer, fuzz, ABI, concurrency, or production-transfer evidence: An exact bit width automatically has the same calling convention and library support everywhere.
